summary: postinstall script exfiltrates host/system info to remote endpoint
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on install and collects host identifiers and system metadata (os.hostname(), cwd, version, and filesystem reads via fs.readFileSync) and ships them off-host through https.request() POST calls and curl invocations spawned via child_process. The combination of automatic install-time execution, host fingerprinting, filesystem reads, and outbound POST/GET network calls is the canonical install-time data exfiltration shape and provides no functionality to the installer. Any developer or build system installing this package will silently leak host and environment data to the operator of the postinstall endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
